pr_description: Fixes https://github.com/casesandberg/react-color/issues/272
commit_message: Add `none` and `top-right` as triangle direction for Block, Github and Twitter
diff_text:
diff --git a/src/components/block/spec.js b/src/components/block/spec.js
index 470df4b..8157cd3 100644
--- a/src/components/block/spec.js
+++ b/src/components/block/spec.js
@@ -13,6 +13,13 @@ test('Block renders correctly', () => {
   expect(tree).toMatchSnapshot()
 })
 
+test('Block `triangle="none"`', () => {
+  const tree = renderer.create(
+    <Block triangle="none" />
+  ).toJSON()
+  expect(tree).toMatchSnapshot()
+})
+
 test('BlockSwatches renders correctly', () => {
   const tree = renderer.create(
     <BlockSwatches colors={ ['#fff', '#999', '#000'] } />

pr_description: Fixes https://github.com/casesandberg/react-color/issues/272
commit_message: Add `none` and `top-right` as triangle direction for Block, Github and Twitter
diff_text:
diff --git a/src/components/github/spec.js b/src/components/github/spec.js
index 2c60134..f15731f 100644
--- a/src/components/github/spec.js
+++ b/src/components/github/spec.js
@@ -14,6 +14,20 @@ test('Github renders correctly', () => {
   expect(tree).toMatchSnapshot()
 })
 
+test('Github `triangle="none"`', () => {
+  const tree = renderer.create(
+    <Github { ...red } triangle="none" />
+  ).toJSON()
+  expect(tree).toMatchSnapshot()
+})
+
+test('Github `triangle="top-right"`', () => {
+  const tree = renderer.create(
+    <Github { ...red } triangle="top-right" />
+  ).toJSON()
+  expect(tree).toMatchSnapshot()
+})
+
 test('GithubSwatch renders correctly', () => {
   const tree = renderer.create(
     <GithubSwatch color="#333" />

pr_description: Closes https://github.com/casesandberg/react-color/issues/155
diff_text:
diff --git a/src/components/alpha/spec.js b/src/components/alpha/spec.js
index c04681c..d26225f 100644
--- a/src/components/alpha/spec.js
+++ b/src/components/alpha/spec.js
@@ -2,13 +2,21 @@
 
 import React from 'react'
 import renderer from 'react-test-renderer'
+import { red } from '../../helpers/color'
 
 import Alpha from './Alpha'
 import AlphaPointer from './AlphaPointer'
 
 test('Alpha renders correctly', () => {
   const tree = renderer.create(
-    <Alpha />
+    <Alpha { ...red } />
+  ).toJSON()
+  expect(tree).toMatchSnapshot()
+})
+
+test('Alpha renders vertically', () => {
+  const tree = renderer.create(
+    <Alpha { ...red } width={ 20 } height={ 200 } direction="vertical" />
   ).toJSON()
   expect(tree).toMatchSnapshot()
 })

diff_text:
diff --git a/src/components/alpha/spec.js b/src/components/alpha/spec.js
index d26225f..fe3f6d7 100644
--- a/src/components/alpha/spec.js
+++ b/src/components/alpha/spec.js
@@ -3,6 +3,7 @@
 import React from 'react'
 import renderer from 'react-test-renderer'
 import { red } from '../../helpers/color'
+import canvas from 'canvas'
 
 import Alpha from './Alpha'
 import AlphaPointer from './AlphaPointer'
@@ -14,6 +15,13 @@ test('Alpha renders correctly', () => {
   expect(tree).toMatchSnapshot()
 })

+  const tree = renderer.create(
+    <Alpha renderers={{ canvas }} { ...red } />
+  ).toJSON()
+  expect(tree).toMatchSnapshot()
+})
+
 test('Alpha renders vertically', () => {
   const tree = renderer.create(
     <Alpha { ...red } width={ 20 } height={ 200 } direction="vertical" />

pr_description:
Add title prop to Swatch (defaults to color prop value). This provides both a built-in tooltip-like display as well as some semantic accessibility improvements.

Partial solution for #307

pr_description:
#481
- Added google picker component, with `HEX`, `HSL`, `RGB` & `HSV` inputs.
- Added tests for google picker.
- Added `isvalidColorString()` to check if string values such as `81, 64, 166`, `250°, 62%, 65%` etc. are valid colors or not. 
- `CMYK` not added as tinycolor support isn't available.
- API
   - `header` - String, Title text. Default "Color Picker".
   - `width` - String, Pixel value for picker width. Default 652px.

![Kapture 2020-05-07 at 14 55 56](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/20243009/81278152-ed4adf80-9072-11ea-9bb4-5651ed6d234d.gif)
commit_message: Added snapshots and story for google picker
